calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-22-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-22-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: K. Farnsworth.
Arnold Evje II, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
Plaintiff's Witness: Bridgette Colbert, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Louette Towns.
Exhibit 1- Fourteen-Day Notice-----------------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 15 Double Rock St., San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Past-due Rent $1,337.00
Holdover Damages $3,703.36
Costs $300.00, for a Total of $5,240.36
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218)

Appearances:
Gilbert Goldbert, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Attorneys, Cindy Lee and Arnold Walter Evje, representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Louette Towns is not present.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The settlement conference is off calendar because the defendant failed to appear. The trial date of October 22, 2007 remains on calendar.
